title: Hujr's companions who were killed
description: Hujr b. 'Adi, Sharik b. Shadd ad al-Hadrami, $ayfi b. Fasil alShaybani, Qabisah b. Dubay'ah al-'Absi, Muhriz b. Shihab alSa'di, then al-Mingari, Kidam b. Hayyan al-'Anazi, 'Abd alRahman b. Hassan al-'Anazi whom he sent to Ziyad so he was

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 18
